# label

**Instance Property**

The label for a contact property value.

## Declaration

```swift
var label: String? { get }
```

## Discussion

A contact property can have a label, such as Home, Work, iPhone, etc. For some predefined label constants, see[doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNPhoneNumber], and [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNContactRelation]. Custom labels can also be used. Labels are not used for [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNSocialProfile] and [doc://com.apple.contacts/documentation/Contacts/CNInstantMessageAddress] properties.

## Getting the label and value

- **value**: A contact property value.
title: label
